name: Pwnagotchi
description: Raspberry Pi WiFi AI that passively roams and collects WPA/WPA2 handshakes (PMKID + full) using reinforcement learning. Flashed as an SD-card .img.
note: id matches sd_backend.PI_IMAGE_PROFILES key 'pwnagotchi'. SD imaging requires an explicit removable target + confirmed=True (and Administrator/root).
